- ![ICON](data:image/png;base64,)[17 Projects for Teams to Build AI Features 100x Faster](https://dev.to/latitude/17-projects-for-teams-to-build-ai-features-100x-faster-nbn?ref=dailydev) - Tools to accelerate AI feature development for teams.

- ![ICON](data:image/png;base64,) [17 Projects for Developers to Build AI Features](https://dev.to/latitude/17-projects-for-teams-to-build-ai-features-100x-faster-nbn?ref=dailydev) - AI project ideas for developers.

  

- ![ICON](data:image/png;base64,) [Dolphin-Llama3](https://ollama.com/library/dolphin-llama3) - AI model library.

  

- ![ICON](data:image/png;base64,) [OpenCodeInterpreter Demo](https://huggingface.co/spaces/m-a-p/OpenCodeInterpreter_demo) - AI-powered code interpreter.

  

- ![ICON](data:image/png;base64,) [Voxal AI](https://voxal.ai/) - Free AI chatbot for AWS.

  

- ![ICON](data:image/png;base64,) [Postgres Sandbox](https://database.build/) - Interactive Postgres database sandbox.

  

- ![ICON](data:image/png;base64,) [Ollama](https://ollama.com/search) - AI model search and deployment.

  

- ![ICON](data:image/png;base64,) [BasedLabs.ai](https://www.basedlabs.ai/) - AI image and video creator.

  

- ![ICON](data:image/png;base64,) [DeepSeek R1 for VS Code](https://dev.to/dwtoledo/how-to-use-deepseek-r1-for-free-in-visual-studio-code-with-cline-or-roo-code-3an9) - AI tool for Visual Studio Code.

  

- ![ICON](data:image/png;base64,) [DataFuel](https://www.datafuel.dev/?ref=dailydev) - AI-powered data tools.

  

- ![ICON](data:image/png;base64,) [Ollama Library](https://ollama.com/library) - AI model library.

  

- ![ICON](data:image/png;base64,) [Local ChatGPT](https://github.com/patchy631/ai-engineering-hub/tree/main/local-chatgpt) - Local ChatGPT implementation.

  

- ![ICON](data:image/png;base64,) [Hugging Face Models](https://huggingface.co/models) - AI model repository.

  

- ![ICON](data:image/png;base64,) [Postiz App](https://github.com/gitroomhq/postiz-app) - Social media scheduling tool with AI.

  

- ![ICON](data:image/png;base64,) [BasedLabs.ai](https://basedlabs.ai/) - AI tools and frameworks for developers.

  

- ![ICON](data:image/png;base64,) [GitHub - ai-engineering-hub/local-chatgpt](https://github.com/ai-engineering-hub/local-chatgpt) - Local version of ChatGPT for custom AI usage.

  

- ![ICON](data:image/png;base64,) [GitHub - CopilotKit/CopilotKit: React](https://github.com/CopilotKit/CopilotKit) - AI-powered code suggestions for React.
